creatives.niche_raw: hacker community, WiFi security researchers, makers who build Raspberry Pi projects, nostalgic millennial hackers who had Tamagotchis
creatives.angle_raw: a cute AI pet that also hacks WiFi — membership signal for the hacker scene, wrapped in nostalgia and personality

claims: Pwnagotchi: Deep Reinforcement Learning for WiFi pwning!
mechanism: running on a Raspberry Pi Zero W
learns from its surrounding WiFi environment
problem_um_raw: To give hackers an excuse to learn about reinforcement learning and WiFi networking—and have a reason to get out for more walks.
enjoying the nostalgic delight of being strangely emotionally attached to a handheld automata yet again

notes: Pwnagotchi is a community project (no DTC store, no price, no commerce page). Relevant as a cultural marker for the maker/hacker niche — 'bought-but-signals-membership' object behavior pattern. The Tamagotchi nostalgia frame is explicitly used. No product purchase possible; flagged as community-project in brands.json. Claims here are from the community wiki page, not a store.
